Code.title: Code
Code.description:
Alphanumerical text identifier with upper-case letters and limits on using
special characters or whitespace to separate blocks.

CodeMap.description: CodeMap is a map of keys to specific codes, useful to determine regime specific codes from their key counterparts.

DateTime.title: Date Time
DateTime.description:
Civil date time in simplified ISO format with no time zone
nor location information, for example: 2021-05-26T13:45:00

desc.title: Description
desc.description: Description offering more details about when the key should be used.

meta.title: Meta
meta.description:
Meta defines any additional details that may be useful or associated
with the key.

sources.title: Sources
sources.description: Where the information was sourced from and where it can be reviewed for updates in the future.

values.title: Values
values.description:
Values defines the possible values associated with the key, which themselves will
either be keys or codes depending on the context.

pattern.title: Pattern
pattern.description:
Pattern is used to validate the key value instead of using a fixed value
from the code or key definitions.

map.title: Code Map
map.description:
Map helps map local keys to specific codes, useful for converting the
described key into a local code.

Definition.description: Definition defines properties of a key, code, or other value that has a specific meaning or utility.

Key.title: Key
Key.description: Text identifier to be used instead of a code for a more verbose but readable identifier.

Meta.description: Meta defines a structure for data about the data being defined.

title.title: Title
title.description: Title stores the name of the source of information.

url.title: URL
url.description: URL is the location of the source of information.

content_type.title: Content Type
content_type.description: ContentType of the information expected at the URL.

at.title: At
at.description: At is the date and time the information was retrieved.

Source.description: Source is used to identify a specific source of data.

String.title: Multi-language String
String.description: Map of 2-Letter language codes to their translations.
